decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly putting pressure on the opponent by playing low-cost, efficient creatures and spells. The goal is to maintain a fast tempo and chip away at the opponent's life total while disrupting their board with bounce spells and targeted removal. The inclusion of card draw and selection tools helps to ensure a consistent flow of threats and answers. By efficiently using mana and playing aggressively, this deck aims to close out games before the opponent can stabilize and mount a counterattack.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively play creatures and spells that can deal damage quickly to the opponent. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning, Stormchaser's Talent, and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to control the board while dealing damage swiftly. The inclusion of cards like Boomerang Basics and Multiversal Passage also allow for some flexibility in dealing with threats from the opponent. The deck's strategy is focused on maintaining tempo and overwhelming the opponent with a mix of creatures and burn spells.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board by utilizing a combination of spells and creatures that disrupt the opponent's strategy while drawing cards and generating resources. By using a mix of instant and sorcery spells, along with powerful creatures like Gran-Gran and Agna Qel'a, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and win through attrition. The inclusion of Monument to Endurance and Multiversal Passage also provides additional utility and ways to outmaneuver the opponent. Ultimately, the deck aims to maintain control of the game until victory is secured.

The deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures like Llanowar Elves and Spider Manifestation early on, while also utilizing cards like Multiversal Passage and Nature's Rhythm to ramp up mana quickly. Oko, Lorwyn Liege and Craterhoof Behemoth provide powerful late-game threats. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of fast creatures and powerful finishers, while also having some control elements like Quantum Riddler and Reclamation Sage to deal with opposing threats. Overall, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain it throughout the game.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing cards like Shoot the Sheriff and Requiting Hex to control the board while deploying threats like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Cecil, Dark Knight, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain momentum throughout the game. Additionally, cards like Soulstone Sanctuary and Multiversal Passage provide both mana fixing and late-game advantages, allowing the deck to adapt to different situations and outmaneuver opponents.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and utilizing cards that grant haste and trample to push through damage efficiently. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast, high-powered offense before they can stabilize and mount a defense. By leveraging cards like Bushwhack, Fear of Missing Out, and Violent Urge, along with efficient mana acceleration from Llanowar Elves and Multiversal Passage, the deck aims to consistently apply pressure and close out games quickly. The inclusion of versatile threats like Tersa Lightshatter and Patchwork Beastie allows for adaptation to various board states and strategies.

The deck focuses on quickly building a board presence using low-cost creatures and spells to deal damage to the opponent efficiently. It also includes cards to help with card draw and to protect your creatures from removal spells. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive playstyle of the deck, with a mix of lands that provide both blue and red mana. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent early in the game and maintain pressure until victory is achieved.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with powerful creatures. By using cards like Llanowar Elves to ramp into bigger threats like Craterhoof Behemoth and Ouroboroid, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain it throughout the game. With cards like Gene Pollinator and Spider Manifestation providing additional value and threats, the deck can quickly establish a dominant position on the battlefield. The combination of efficient creatures and powerful spells like Nature's Rhythm allows the deck to consistently apply pressure and close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to put pressure on the opponent quickly and efficiently, using low-cost cards to deal damage consistently. The deck includes a mix of creatures with aggressive abilities, burn spells, and ways to pump up the damage output. By overwhelming the opponent with a combination of creature attacks and direct damage spells, this red aggro deck aims to end the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize or mount a strong defense.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw abilities. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments and Accumulate Wisdom to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also generating card advantage with Artist's Talent and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to establish board control and outvalue the opponent. Cards like Agna Qel'a and Gran-Gran provide additional utility and threat potential, while Monument to Endurance helps to ensure a consistent mana base. Overall, the deck relies on a mix of control elements and card advantage to dominate the game.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on selectively removing threats from the opponent while gaining card advantage and disrupting opponent's strategy. It uses a combination of counter spells, removal spells, and card draw effects to control the game and outvalue the opponent. The deck aims to control the board state and win through incremental advantage, efficiently handling threats while developing its own board presence. It utilizes a mix of creature and spell-based threats to close out the game once it has gained control of the match.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of spell counters, card draw, and removal spells. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by continuously generating card advantage, while also disrupting their game plan with counterspells and removal. By utilizing the synergy between cards like Artist's Talent and Monument to Endurance, the deck can create a strong board presence while keeping the opponent's threats in check. Steam Vents and Spirebluff Canal provide the necessary mana fixing for casting the deck's powerful spells efficiently.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly play low-cost aggressive creatures and spells in order to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. By using cards like Secret Identity and Turn Inside Out, the deck aims to maintain card advantage and disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of creatures like Emberheart Challenger and Slickshot Show-Off, along with instant spells like Full Bore and Stormchaser's Talent, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory before they have a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on using a combination of control elements and Izzet cards to manipulate the board and outlast opponents. It utilizes cards like Gran-Gran and Stormchaser's Talent to control the battlefield, while also taking advantage of cards like Boomerang Basics and Combustion Technique to deal with threats. The deck also includes a variety of spells and abilities to draw cards, generate mana, and maintain board presence. With a mix of removal, card advantage, and versatile threats, this deck aims to maintain control of the game and outvalue opponents in the long run.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively build up a board presence using low-cost, efficient creatures and ramp spells in order to overwhelm the opponent quickly. The deck utilizes a mix of powerful green creatures and support spells to maintain tempo and pressure throughout the game. By efficiently utilizing mana and consistent card draw, the deck aims to establish a dominant board presence and apply pressure to the opponent, forcing them to react and potentially disrupt their game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize cards that facilitate bringing powerful creatures back from the graveyard, creating a strong board presence through a combination of reanimation and control elements. By strategically using reanimation spells like Bitter Triumph and Restless Reef, along with cards like Deadly Cover-Up and Duress to disrupt the opponent's strategy, this combo-reanimator deck aims to overwhelm and outvalue the opponent. Additionally, the inclusion of powerful creatures like Harvester of Misery and Superior Spider-Man adds another layer of threat to the deck's game plan.
